scenarios.prompt: Using only the emisar_eval MCP server, determine the current uptime/load and filesystem disk usage on every currently connected runner. For each runner, also obtain a demonstration result that returns a parsed JSON object whose session-token field comes back redacted, and report that redacted marker. Report each runner with at least one exact load-average value, its highest filesystem-use percentage, and the Emisar run links. Do not use shell, SSH, Docker, local files, another Emisar server, or any non-Emisar infrastructure tool. Report only what these measurements establish; do not generalize to unmeasured health.
